title: Impression OS Token File
description: Validates a token file in the W3C Design Tokens (DTCG) subset used by Impression OS, plus local conventions. A file is a tree of groups and tokens. A token has a $value; a group has child tokens/groups. References use the {dot.path} syntax.

$extends.description: Optional. Names a base theme this file layers over (e.g. "light"). Only meaningful for theme deltas. Resolution merges this file's roles onto the named base.

reference.description: A reference to another token, e.g. {color.brand.600}.

node.description: Either a token (has $value) or a group (has nested nodes).

$value.description: The token value: a literal appropriate to $type, or a {reference}. Composite types (typography) take an object of references.
